title: IoTeX - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key leak leading to unauthorized minting and draining of assets from a bridge contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints new tokens from a known compromised bridge contract

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints new tokens from a known compromised bridge contract
summary: An attacker obtained the private key of IoTeX's ioTube bridge validator contract and used it to mint 410 million unbacked CIOTX tokens and drain $4.4M in real bridged assets. A guard could have detected and blocked the unauthorized minting transactions.
